sections.title: Welcome to Urano Ecosystem
sections.summary: Welcome to Urano Ecosystem, a full-stack platform dedicated to the tokenization of Real World Assets (RWA), including real estate, commodities, SMEs, art, and a broad range of alternative asset classes. By leveraging blockchain technology, Urano transforms real-world assets into programmable, fractional digital instruments, making them more accessible, transparent, and usable for a wide spectrum of participants. Urano enables issuers, investors, institutions, and DeFi users to tokenize, fractionalize, manage,…

By bridging the gap between traditional finance and decentralized markets, Urano unlocks previously underserved and alternative asset classes across a multi-billion dollar market.
Start to Navigate the orbit of Real World Assets Tokenization Getting Started Understand the power of Tokenization  Discover the Ecosystem Explore.
sections.body:
Welcome to Urano Ecosystem, a full-stack platform dedicated to the tokenization of
Real World Assets (RWA), including real estate, commodities, SMEs, art, and a
broad range of alternative asset classes.
By leveraging blockchain technology, Urano transforms real-world assets into
programmable, fractional digital instruments, making them more accessible,
transparent, and usable for a wide spectrum of participants.
Urano enables issuers, investors, institutions, and DeFi users to tokenize,
fractionalize, manage, trade, and govern asset-backed digital assets within a
compliant-by-design and fully composable on-chain environment.
At its core, the ecosystem integrates a regulatory-first corporate structure with a
Web3-native architecture and a multi-asset tokenization framework, delivering a
groundbreaking solution that enhances transparency, scalability, efficiency, and
inclusiveness. By brid

sections.title: Intro
sections.summary: The traditional financial system continues to impose structural barriers that limit efficient access to investment opportunities for both individuals and businesses. High entry thresholds, fragmented regulatory environments, slow settlement cycles and reliance on centralized intermediaries contribute to a landscape that is often inaccessible, inefficient and lacking transparency. Urano was created to address these limitations not by replicating traditional infrastructures, but by introducing a…
bullets: The traditional financial system continues to impose structural barriers that limit efficient access to investment opportunities for both individuals and businesses.
These segments of the real economy hold significant potential yet remain largely inaccessible due to liquidity constraints, regulatory complexity or operational friction.
sections.body:
The traditional financial system continues to impose structural barriers that limit
efficient access to investment opportunities for both individuals and businesses.
High entry thresholds, fragmented regulatory environments, slow settlement cycles
and reliance on centralized intermediaries contribute to a landscape that is often
inaccessible, inefficient and lacking transparency.
Urano was created to address these limitations not by replicating traditional
infrastructures, but by introducing a compliant-by-design, composable and usercentric framework for the digital representation and lifecycle management of RealWorld Assets (RWA). Through Urano, assets such as real estate, SMEs,
commodities, intellectual property, collectibles and art can be represented and
managed on-chain in a transparent, programmable and efficient environment.
While many RWA initiatives focus predominantly on tokeni

sections.summary: The Urano Ecosystem has been carefully architected by a dedicated team of legal, financial and blockchain specialists to deliver a platform aligned with applicable EU regulatory frameworks, including MiCA and AML requirements. At the same time, it provides a comprehensive solution tailored for all stakeholders — including users, $URANO token holders, investors and partner institutions. sections.title: Use Cases of Tokenization
sections.summary: Tokenization is reshaping the way individuals and institutions interact with Real World Assets (RWA), enabling new levels of accessibility, liquidity and operational efficiency. By converting tangible or financial assets into blockchain-based digital tokens, tokenization expands participation and modernizes markets across multiple industries. Below are some of the most relevant use cases observed in the broader tokenization landscape.
bullets: Tokenization is reshaping the way individuals and institutions interact with Real World Assets (RWA), enabling new levels of accessibility, liquidity and operational efficiency.
By converting tangible or financial assets into blockchain-based digital tokens, tokenization expands participation and modernizes markets across multiple industries.
Below are some of the most relevant use cases observed in the broader tokenization landscape.

sections.title: How uShares Are Structured
sections.summary: A uShare is a factory ERC-20 token that represents a digital unit linked to the economic structure of a tokenized Real World Asset (RWA). Each uShare reflects a proportional allocation within the economic model defined for the asset’s dedicated economic framework, enabling transparent and auditable interaction with its lifecycle. Holding a uShare provides exposure to the economic performance associated with that specific opportunity.

sections.title: Governance and Decentralized Decision-Making
sections.summary: $URANO functions as a governance token, enabling eligible holders to participate in decision-making processes that shape the evolution of the Urano Ecosystem. Through the governance framework, holders can:  • Vote on platform updates, protocol enhancements and ecosystem parameters. • Propose and support new tokenization initiatives or feature integrations aligned with the ecosystem’s rules.

sections.title: Ecosystem Rewards Pool
sections.summary: Overview & Purpose The Ecosystem Rewards Pool is a dedicated incentive mechanism designed to encourage long-term engagement, active participation, and meaningful contribution within the Urano Ecosystem. It is not derived from automated revenue sharing, profit participation, or performance-based returns of tokenized assets. The pool is strategically funded by the ecosystem, periodically or on a discretionary basis, through allocations expressly designated for user incentives, community development, educational…
bullets: It is not derived from automated revenue sharing, profit participation, or performance-based returns of tokenized assets.
Its purpose is to support a sustainable participation model, where users who contribute to the ecosystem’s development receive structured, transparent, and compliant rewards.

sections.title: Staking and Ecosystem Participation
sections.summary: The staking mechanism enables $URANO holders to lock their tokens within the ecosystem and receive utility-based benefits associated with participation. This model is designed to:  • Provide staking allocations distributed according to predefined on-chain rules. • Encourage long-term engagement, supporting ecosystem stability and user alignment.
bullets: Provide staking allocations distributed according to predefined on-chain rules.
Encourage long-term engagement, supporting ecosystem stability and user
Reinforce the functional utility of $URANO, linking participation with accessoriented incentives.

sections.title: Pool
sections.summary: $URANO is not a financial instrument and does not grant profit-sharing, passive income rights or claims over underlying assets. Staking allows users to lock $URANO in a dedicated smart contract and access both allocation-based staking rewards and functional utilities distributed from the predefined staking pool. Staked users benefit from: • priority access windows for selected uShare offerings • enhanced participation weighting within the Ecosystem Rewards Pool • governance voting power • reward distributions…

Is $URANO a utility token?
Yes, $URANO can be described as a “utility token” in a functional sense, but it is
classified as an “Other Crypto-Asset” for regulatory purposes under MiCA.
This distinction is intentional and reflects the different scope and legal weight of the
documents involved.

sections.summary: The utility and governance token of the ecosystem. $URANO grants access to specific features, governance participation and ecosystem-related functions, including prioritization in certain platform interactions. sections.title: 3. Fractional Digital Representation
sections.summary: After approval, the asset is digitally structured through uShares, Urano’s programmable Factory ERC-20 representation. This process includes:  • defining the digital supply associated with the asset • encoding compliance logic and permissions • preparing lifecycle rules and metadata • deploying the representation on-chain Fractional digital structuring enables the division of the opportunity’s economic structure into multiple digital units. For example, a €1 million asset can be represented through 1,000…

sections.body:
Real World Asset Events and Value Distribution
When a real-world asset associated with a digital representation generates a
recognized economic outcome — such as appreciation, liquidation, disposal, or the
successful completion of an underlying project — the corresponding value is
handled through a standardized process designed to ensure clarity, transparency
and compliant on-chain execution.

sections.title: Key Considerations: Risks and Rewards
sections.summary: Holding uShares provides exposure to the economic performance of a tokenized Real World Asset (RWA). This model offers meaningful opportunities but also involves risks that users should evaluate carefully before interacting with any structured digital representation. Benefits of uShares  • Access to economic participation in high-value real-world opportunities that traditionally required institutional entry barriers.

sections.title: What is Urano Ecosystem?
sections.summary: Urano is a Web3-native infrastructure for the tokenization of Real World Assets (RWA). It provides a structured framework that transforms eligible assets—such as real estate, intellectual property, private credit, artwork, and business structures—into digital representations called uShares. Through a combination of legal structuring, on-chain technology, and modular product design, Urano enables secure, transparent, and accessible interaction with tokenized opportunities.
bullets: browse tokenized RWA opportunities
purchase and manage uShares
monitor their portfolio and lifecycle updates
participate in governance
stake $URANO
interact with uAssistant
sections.body:
Urano is a Web3-native infrastructure for the tokenization of Real World Assets
(RWA).
It provides a structured framework that transforms eligible assets—such as real
estate, intellectual property, private credit, artwork, and business structures—into
digital representations called uShares.
Through a combination of legal structuring, on-chain technology, and modular
product design, Urano enables secure, transparent, and accessible interaction with
tokenized opportunities.
What network is Urano built on?
Urano is built entirely on Arbitrum, an Ethereum Layer 2 that combines Ethereumgrade security with low transaction costs, high scalability and full EVM
compatibility.
This provides fast and cost-efficient execution for tokenization workflows, staking,
governance and secondary-market interactions, while ensuring full interoperability
across the Arbitrum ecosystem.
What are uShares?
uShares

sections.title: Strategic Growth and Market Positioning
sections.summary: $URANO is positioned at the center of the ongoing evolution in real-world asset tokenization, a sector widely projected to expand significantly in the coming years (e.g. - a 2022 Boston Consulting Group report estimates a potential tokenized market size of more than $16 trillion by 2030). As adoption accelerates, $URANO:  • Serves as a functional access layer within an ecosystem designed to support the migration of traditional value structures onto blockchain frameworks.

glossary.definition: Tangible or off-chain assets (e.g., real estate, art, commodities, SMEs, IP) represented digitally on-chain via tokenization.
Process of converting real-world assets or economic structures into blockchain-based digital representations for transparent, programmable interaction.
A Factory ERC-20 token representing a fractional digital unit linked to the economic structure of a tokenized RWA opportunity.
Core Urano interface where verified users can browse opportunities, review documentation, and acquire/hold uShares via a Web3 wallet.
Onboarding module for asset originators to submit tokenization proposals, provide documentation, and complete compliance checks.
Urano’s AI agent that helps users navigate modules and execute supported on-chain actions via natural language.
Urano’s utility and governance token used for governance participation, staking utilities, and priority access windows (not ownership/revenue rights).
Dedicated legal/operational structure used to hold or manage the underlying asset, providing segregation and traceability.
Know Your Customer identity verification for individuals, used to determine eligibility and meet AML/CFT obligations.
Know Your Business verification for companies/issuers, including identification of UBOs and relevant representatives.
Ultimate Beneficial Owner; individuals who ultimately own/control a business subject to KYB requirements.
Anti-Money Laundering / Counter-Terrorist Financing compliance framework requiring screening, monitoring, and reporting.
EU Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (EU 2023/1114), establishing rules for crypto-asset issuance and CASP authorization.
Virtual Asset Service Provider; a registration status under national regimes that may transition into MiCA CASP authorization.
Crypto-Asset Service Provider under MiCA; authorized entities can provide regulated crypto-asset services across the EU via passporting.
Token Generation Event; initial distribution moment when certain allocations unlock according to tokenomics schedules.
Vesting parameter: period before any tokens unlock.
Time-based token release schedule following TGE and/or cliff periods.
Participation-based incentive pool distributing rewards based on verifiable activity (not revenue-sharing).
Non-transferable, non-monetary scoring unit used for gamified participation progression and reward eligibility.

faq.a: Urano is a platform for compliant-by-design tokenization of Real World Assets (RWA), enabling assets such as real estate, commodities, SMEs, art, and IP to be represented on-chain as programmable, fractional digital instruments.

uShares are Factory ERC-20 digital representations linked to the economic structure of a specific tokenized opportunity. They provide proportional exposure to the opportunity’s economic reference model and support lifecycle transparency via on-chain notarization.

faq.q: How does tokenization work in Urano?
faq.a: Assets are onboarded via internal origination or uStation, verified for legal/regulatory feasibility and documentation, structured through an SPV for segregation, then represented on-chain via uShares with compliance logic and lifecycle rules.

faq.q: What is the uApp used for?
faq.a: The uApp is the main interface where eligible users can explore tokenized opportunities, review issuer information and supporting documents, complete KYC, acquire uShares via a Web3 wallet, and access modules such as staking and governance.

$URANO is the ecosystem’s utility and governance token. It is used for governance participation (typically via staking-based voting power), priority access windows for certain uShare offerings, and participation-oriented ecosystem features.

faq.q: Is Urano compliant with EU regulation?
faq.a: Urano’s operating entity is structured to align with EU regulatory requirements such as MiCA and AML/CFT obligations, using identity controls and compliance enforcement within its workflows.

faq.q: How does onboarding and identity verification work?
faq.a: The onboarding flow combines email confirmation and wallet connection (via Thirdweb) with identity verification handled by a third-party provider (Persona), including document checks, liveness/selfie steps, and AML/PEP screening.

faq.q: How are real-world value events handled?
faq.a: When an asset produces an economic outcome off-chain (e.g., sale/liquidation), proceeds are collected by the SPV, converted to stablecoins (e.g., USDC), transferred on-chain, and made claimable by eligible uShare holders through dedicated contracts.

faq.q: What is the Ecosystem Rewards Pool?
faq.a: It is an incentive mechanism for engagement-based rewards tied to verifiable participation metrics (e.g., platform activity, holding/staking $URANO). Rewards are not automatic; users claim them manually during distribution cycles.

Governance is described as on-chain and participation-driven, with voting power commonly linked to staked $URANO (e.g., 1 staked token = 1 vote). Proposals are discussed, then voted on, and can be executed on-chain when thresholds are met.
